query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.tables WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%mood%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%event%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%upload%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%submission%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%grade%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%summar%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%flag%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%struggle%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%book%') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.tables WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%mood%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%event%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%upload%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%submission%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%grade%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%summar%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%flag%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%struggle%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%book%') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
